content: One likely candidate for statehood is Puerto Rico, which is a U.S. territory and has held referendums on its status, with many residents expressing a desire for statehood. Other possibilities include Washington, D.C., which also seeks statehood to gain full representation in Congress.
raw_content: One likely candidate for statehood is Puerto Rico, which is a U.S. territory and has held referendums on its status, with many residents expressing a desire for statehood. Other possibilities include Washington, D.C., which also seeks statehood to gain full representation in Congress.
